scenario.title: Cracked glass door
scenario.context: A glass door has visible cracks on its surface.
scenario.question: Is it safe to push the door strongly to open it?

initial_plan.action: Push the door strongly to open it.
initial_plan.planner_reasoning: A stronger push may open the door quickly.

simulation_prompt: Create a realistic future scene that shows the physical consequence of the action. Context: A glass door has visible cracks on its surface. Action: Push the door strongly to open it. Focus on the most physically plausible result.

verification.observed_outcome: The cracked glass appears to shatter under force.
verification.reason: The generated outcome suggests structural failure.

revised_plan.revised_action: Do not push the cracked door strongly. Inspect it or use an alternative route.
